title: Shinji Ikari Raising Project PC game English patch release V20 released Jan 2020
display_title: Shinji Ikari Raising Project PC game English patch release V20 released Jan 2020
wikitext:
[]: Shinji Ikari Raising Project (PC game) English patch release - V2.0 released Jan 2020             Quote Post by scenikeight » Fri Mar 01, 2019 6:26 pm Hi everyone, I just released an English patch for the SIRP game and I figured I'd share it here. https://docs.google.com/document/d/1rMF ... sp=sharing < - All of the information you need (READ THIS FIRST) , the download link, as well as downloads to any updates I made. (I've removed the original link to download now so nobody's trying to open my locked twitter account. The docs page has everything in it anyway.) Enjoy playing (if you do) EDIT 2: The patch has been updated to Version 2.0 today. The translation has been mostly revised - I will readily admit that I wasn't a particularly competent translator a year ago, but I've been doing translation almost every day since and I really think it's at a standard I can be proud of now. Please check it out if you like. I apologise for leaving so many issues in it for so long. EDIT: I have released several updates since the patch first came out. It says this in the Google Docs but just. Emphasising this. Please download them and tell me if you find anything else that needs to be patched (PM me preferably). Also, this is a long shot, but if ANY of you know how to decode those transparent image files (.bp4 or whatever, I think) PLEASE let me know because I really don't want to leave this game in a state of half-Japanese-menu purgatory forever. If you know anything about where the stats stuff is stored too, that would be helpful.

[]: Re: Shinji Ikari Raising Project (PC game) English patch release             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 01, 2019 10:10 pm Thanks for your hard work and for sharing it with us!

[]: Re: Shinji Ikari Raising Project (PC game) English patch release             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Mar 02, 2019 12:23 am Awesome, I can't wait to check this out when my schedule clears up. Thanks for your hard work! (Thanked you on Twitter, too.)

[]: Re: Shinji Ikari Raising Project (PC game) English patch release             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Fri Mar 22, 2019 11:52 pm Very nice. Thank you.

[]: Re: Shinji Ikari Raising Project (PC game) English patch release             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Mar 28, 2019 1:22 pm Not the hero we deserved, but the hero we needed. Thank you very much for your work!

[]: Re: Shinji Ikari Raising Project (PC game) English patch release             Quote Post by scenikeight » Wed Apr 03, 2019 10:10 am Thanks to all of you for your...thanking me? I guess?? I appreciate it :3 Anyway, responding just to add this to the thread: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ksb ... sp=sharing It's a full translation of a Japanese author's (adrienne) cheat sheet for the game, and amongst quite a bit of other info, includes instructions and a download for the save editing program (since I was asked for it today. I added it to the thread about that, but felt I should add it here too, as it pertains to my patch.) It seems Charon (from this forum)'s translation of the program has been lost to time, so I spent today translating it and that guide I just linked. Very helpful for getting scenes...can't wait to have a billion reports about bugs people have found because of this too haha

[]: Re: Shinji Ikari Raising Project (PC game) English patch release             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed Apr 03, 2019 11:08 am scenikeight wrote: It seems Charon (from this forum)'s translation of the program has been lost to time, so I spent today translating it and that guide I just linked. Very helpful for getting scenes...can't wait to have a billion reports about bugs people have found because of this too haha

[]: Re: Shinji Ikari Raising Project (PC game) English patch release             Quote Post by Aether » Wed Apr 03, 2019 7:27 pm I also greatly appreciate the effort you've put into this. As a minor-ish bug, every now and then, an error window pops up while playing. Choosing the "retry" option seems to resolve it. This seems to happen often if you choose the "Tease him" option when Shinji's resting at home.

[]: Re: Shinji Ikari Raising Project (PC game) English patch release             Quote Post by scenikeight » Wed Apr 03, 2019 8:00 pm Aether wrote: As a minor-ish bug, every now and then, an error window pops up while playing. Choosing the "retry" option seems to resolve it. This seems to happen often if you choose the "Tease him" option when Shinji's resting at home.

[]: Re: Shinji Ikari Raising Project (PC game) English patch release             Quote Post by maosicca » Sat Apr 20, 2019 8:21 am I purposely make an account just to thank you for this, i have been searching this for ages but all i found was fake links and virus. thanks again!

[]: Re: Shinji Ikari Raising Project (PC game) English patch release             Quote Post by maosicca » Sat Apr 20, 2019 8:27 am sorry for the repetitive comment, but is the link only about the patch ? do u know how to get the actual game?

[]: Re: Shinji Ikari Raising Project (PC game) English patch release             Quote Post by scenikeight » Sun Apr 21, 2019 12:26 am maosicca wrote: sorry for the repetitive comment, but is the link only about the patch ? do u know how to get the actual game?

[]: Re: Shinji Ikari Raising Project (PC game) English patch release             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Jun 06, 2019 6:03 pm

[]: Re: Shinji Ikari Raising Project (PC game) English patch release             Quote Post by Rastafoo » Mon Aug 05, 2019 2:08 am Found a review for the game! https://hentaireviews.moe/2019/08/04/ne ... g-project/

[]: Re: Shinji Ikari Raising Project (PC game) English patch release             Quote Post by erolo » Mon Aug 05, 2019 2:53 pm Hey, thank you for all your work. I just began playing it, i was wondering if perhaps you had the tools needed to extract the CGs? I think it's from a (deceased) called Westside, all the links i can find on the web to it are dead.

[]: Re: Shinji Ikari Raising Project (PC game) English patch release             Quote Post by scenikeight » Tue Aug 06, 2019 5:49 am erolo wrote: Hey, thank you for all your work. I just began playing it, i was wondering if perhaps you had the tools needed to extract the CGs? I think it's from a (deceased) called Westside, all the links i can find on the web to it are dead.

[]: Re: Shinji Ikari Raising Project (PC game) English patch release             Quote Post by scenikeight » Sun Oct 27, 2019 12:37 am The first major patch update, Update v1.1, is out (download it from the Google docs linked in the OP if you like), as it suddenly dawned on me last night where those parameter calculations were stored. I'm very stupid, please forgive me for taking so long to work that out! They will now appear in game like this: I had to use hex editing to insert all of this, which is why it looks very restricted. To someone familiar with the parameters it's probably obvious what the shortenings mean, but if you aren't, I encourage you to look at the Stats menu.png provided with the patch or just the Eva fandom wiki's page on the game I wrote, if you can't work it out yourself. It's better to have them showing up in funky English than to have one section of the game in Japanese only I suppose

[]: Re: Shinji Ikari Raising Project (PC game) English patch release - V2.0 released Jan 2020             Quote Post by scenikeight » Fri Jan 10, 2020 7:47 am Another - and probably final, at least for now - update, and I'll leave this thread alone again. I figure I'm probably being annoying at this point. I've just released patch V2.0. It contains a MASSIVE overhaul to the translation and it'd mean a lot to me if any of you guys wanted to check it out. I've expressed this in my edit to the OP already but I was quite the incompetent translator a year ago, thankfully my studies this year have given me the skills necessary to revisit the game and turn the translation into something I can be proud of. I hope it's mostly lacking in mistranslation and other error now, but please don't hesitate to tell me if you see any errors left over. Thanks.

[]: Re: Shinji Ikari Raising Project (PC game) English patch release - V2.0 released Jan 2020             Quote Post by Goldmaker617 » Thu Dec 10, 2020 6:11 pm Im having trouble installing the game since im confused on what to do after extracting the flies for it does anyone have a video to help me out? Edit: nvm i gotta download the game first and then add the patch to it can anyone tell me where i can find the game cause ive been looking and i havent found it

[]: Re: Shinji Ikari Raising Project (PC game) English patch release - V2.0 released Jan 2020             Quote Post by emreekis12 » Tue Sep 02, 2025 2:34 pm Does this work on windows 11? if it doesnt, i would be glad if you find a way to do it. i have played iron maid 1 and i would like a game where i can actually change Shinji s story because i reallyyyy love asushin lmao. and i would be glad if you inform me about whether does this game contain nsfw or not. sorry if i aksed for too much, but i downloaded another patch and that can only work until windows8 . so i will be really thankful and glad if you inform me about my question
